title: croton leptopus
intro: Croton leptopus, also known as the 'Wild Croton' or 'Pangkor Croton', is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Croton leptopus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. The herbal preparations of Croton leptopus include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are typically made from the leaves and stems of the plant.
